examples.title: Add ActualText to Images for PDF Accessibility
examples.description: Demonstrates how to attach an ActualText attribute to image structure elements in a tagged PDF using Aspose.Pdf, providing screen‑reader descriptions for accessibility.

examples.title: Add Caption Note to Figure in Tagged PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's tagged‑content API to create a Figure element, attach a Note element as its caption, and save the PDF with proper accessibility tags.

examples.title: Add Custom Data Type Tags to PDF Table Cells and Validate PDF/A Compliance
examples.description: The example loads an existing PDF, creates a tagged table with custom data‑type tags on each cell, saves the modified document, and validates it against PDF/A‑1B compliance.

examples.title: Add Custom Tag to Paragraph in Tagged PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to assign a custom tag name to a paragraph element in a tagged PDF using Aspose.Pdf and save the document.

examples.title: Add External Link with Title to a Tagged PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to insert a clickable link with visible text and a title attribute into a tagged PDF for accessibility using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Figure Title to Tagged PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's Tagged Content API to create a figure element, assign a concise title for accessibility, and insert it into the PDF's structure tree.

examples.title: Add Internal Link Element to Tagged PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a structure element with the /Link role in a tagged PDF, bind it to a visual link annotation, and set an internal page destination.

examples.title: Add Missing Language Attributes to PDF Structure Elements
examples.description: Demonstrates how to set a default language for a PDF and recursively assign language attributes to all tagged structure elements that lack one, using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Note Element to Paragraph in Tagged PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a note (footnote/endnote) element and attach it as a child of a paragraph in a tagged PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Page Break to Tagged PDF Logical Structure
examples.description: Shows how to insert a page‑break element into the logical structure tree of a tagged PDF using Aspose.Pdf's tagged content API.

examples.title: Add Paragraph to TOCI Element with ActualText for Accessibility
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a TOCI (Table of Contents Item) element, add a paragraph beneath it, and set the paragraph's ActualText to improve screen‑reader accessibility in a tagged PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Tagged Form Field with Placeholder to PDF
examples.description: Loads an existing PDF, creates a TextBox form field with placeholder text, tags it with a /Form structure element for accessibility, and saves the updated document.

examples.title: Add Tagged Table to PDF Document
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a three‑row, four‑column table in a tagged PDF using Aspose.Pdf's logical structure API.

examples.title: Apply Custom Row Borders to PDF Table
examples.description: Demonstrates how to set different border styles for table rows and cells in a PDF based on the row index, using Aspose.Pdf's BorderInfo.

examples.title: Batch Convert Untagged PDFs to Tagged PDFs with Auto‑Tagging
examples.description: Demonstrates how to process a folder of untagged PDF files, enable auto‑tagging, convert them to PDF/UA format, and save the tagged PDFs to a separate directory.

examples.title: Batch PDF Validation and Dashboard Generation
examples.description: Validates multiple PDFs for PDF/A‑1B compliance, writes XML logs for each file, and creates a summary dashboard PDF that shows compliance percentages per file.

examples.title: Batch Tag PDFs in a Folder
examples.description: The example iterates through all PDF files in a directory, enables automatic tagging for missing structure elements, sets language and title, and saves each tagged PDF with a "_tagged" suffix.

examples.title: Batch Validate PDFs and Generate XML Logs with Summary CSV
examples.description: The example loads each PDF in a folder, validates it against PDF/A‑1B using Aspose.Pdf, saves an XML validation log for each file, and creates a CSV summary of the validation results.

examples.title: Check PDF/UA Compliance and Log Result
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, evaluate its PDF/UA compliance via Document.IsPdfUaCompliant, and write the boolean outcome to the console and a log file.

examples.title: Convert PDF to PDF/UA with Automatic Tagging
examples.description: Shows how to convert an existing PDF to a PDF/UA‑1 compliant document by enabling automatic tagging and saving it as a tagged PDF.

examples.title: Create Form Field and Tag it for Accessibility
examples.description: Shows how to add a TextBox form field to a PDF, register it in the AcroForm, and associate it with a /Form structure element to make the document accessible.

examples.title: Create Merged Table Header with TH Role and ActualText in Tagged PDF
examples.description: Loads an existing PDF, builds a tagged table with a header row where the first TH cell spans two columns, assigns the /TH role and sets /ActualText for each header, then saves the tagged PDF.

examples.title: Create Nested Table Inside Paragraph for Tagged PDF
examples.description: Shows how to build a tagged PDF where a paragraph contains an outer table, and one of its cells hosts a nested inner table, using Aspose.Pdf's tagging API.

examples.title: Create PDF with Tagged Heading and Language
examples.description: Shows how to create a new PDF, add a level‑1 heading structure element, set document‑level and element language attributes, and save the tagged PDF for accessibility.

examples.title: Create Tagged List in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a logical list structure with list items, labels, and body paragraphs to an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf's tagged‑content API.

examples.title: Create Tagged PDF with Table of Contents
examples.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF with tagged content, add heading elements, and build a logical table of contents using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Export PDF Structure Tree to JSON
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, access its tagged (logical) structure, and serialize the structure tree into a JSON file for accessibility analysis.

examples.title: Export PDF Structure Tree to XML and Generate Report via XSLT
examples.description: Shows how to export a PDF's logical structure tree to an XML file using Aspose.Pdf and then apply an XSLT stylesheet to create an HTML report.

examples.title: Export Tagged PDF Content to JSON
examples.description: Demonstrates how to read the logical structure of a tagged PDF using Aspose.Pdf, convert the hierarchy into a serializable object, and write it as an indented JSON file.

examples.title: Extract Note Elements from Tagged PDF and Save to Text
examples.description: Loads a PDF, accesses its tagged content, finds all NoteElement objects, concatenates their ActualText values, and writes the combined text to a UTF‑8 plain‑text file.

examples.title: Extract PDF Link URLs to CSV
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterating through link annotations to retrieve their target URLs, and writing the collected URLs to a CSV file.

examples.title: Extract Text from Tagged PDF via Structure Tree
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, access its tagged content, traverse the logical structure tree, and collect the visible text from each structure element.

examples.title: Find Images Missing Alternative Text in PDF
examples.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through each page and its image resources, checks for alternative text, and lists the identifiers of images that have no alt text.

examples.title: Iterate Tagged PDF Structure Elements
examples.description: Loads a PDF, accesses its tagged content, and recursively walks the logical structure tree, logging each element's title, language and custom tag name.

examples.title: Modify Paragraph ActualText in Tagged PDF
examples.description: Loads a tagged PDF, searches for a paragraph by its visible title, updates the paragraph's ActualText for accessibility correction, and saves the modified document.

examples.title: Parse XML Validation Report and Summarize Error Codes
examples.description: Shows how to load an XML validation report, extract error codes using LINQ to XML, count their frequencies, and output a human‑readable summary to the console and a text file.

examples.title: Propagate Language Attribute to Tagged PDF Elements
examples.description: Demonstrates how to set a language attribute on the root structure element of a tagged PDF and automatically propagate it to all descendant elements using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Replace Existing Note Elements in a Tagged PDF
examples.description: Shows how to remove all existing NoteElement objects from a PDF's structure tree and add a new note with updated text using Aspose.Pdf's tagged content API.

examples.title: Set ActualText on a Span for Hidden Pronunciation in Tagged PDF
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's TaggedContent API to create a span element, assign hidden pronunciation text via the ActualText property, and add it to a tagged PDF document.

examples.title: Set Document Language in Tagged PDF
examples.description: Shows how to add a language attribute to a PDF's structure tree using Aspose.Pdf's tagged content API for improved accessibility.

examples.title: Set Paragraph Title for PDF Accessibility
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's tagged‑content API to create a paragraph element, assign a concise Title property for accessibility, and save the updated PDF.

examples.title: Set Root Structure Element Title in Tagged PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to assign a title to the root structure element of a tagged PDF using Aspose.Pdf, and optionally updates the document's Info.Title property before saving.

examples.title: Style Table Cells with Background, Border, and Padding
examples.description: Demonstrates how to apply background color, border thickness, and padding to each cell of a table in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Update Language of a Tagged PDF Structure Element to French
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, access its tagged content, locate a ParagraphElement, set its language to French, and save the document. Optionally shows where to invoke PDF/UA validation.

examples.title: Validate PDF/UA Compliance and Generate XML Report
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, validate it against PDF/UA‑1 standards, write an XML compliance report, and read the compliance status via the IsPdfUaCompliant property.

examples.title: Add Blank Page to PDF Document
examples.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF with Aspose.Pdf, append a new blank page, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Add Custom XMP Metadata to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates loading an existing PDF, inserting a custom XMP metadata packet, and saving the document while preserving the new metadata.

examples.title: Append Page to PDF Using Incremental Save
examples.description: Demonstrates opening an existing PDF with read/write access, adding a new blank page with a text fragment, and saving the document using Aspose.Pdf's incremental update mode so only the changes are written.

examples.title: Batch Convert PDFs to PDF/A-1b with High Compression
examples.description: Demonstrates how to batch process PDF files, convert each to PDF/A-1b format with high compression using Aspose.Pdf, and generate a summary report of the conversion results.

examples.title: Batch Convert PDFs to PDF/A-1b
examples.description: Shows how to iterate over PDF files in a folder, convert each to PDF/A‑1b compliance with Aspose.Pdf, log conversion issues, and save the output files.

examples.title: Batch Convert PDFs to PDF/A-1b with CSV Log
examples.description: Demonstrates converting multiple PDF files to PDF/A-1b using Aspose.Pdf, saving the converted files, and logging each conversion result to a CSV file.

examples.title: Batch Decrypt Encrypted PDFs with Owner Password
examples.description: Shows how to open multiple password‑protected PDF files using a shared owner password, remove their encryption, and save unprotected copies.

examples.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs with Passwords Derived from File Names
examples.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt multiple PDF files using Aspose.Pdf, generating deterministic passwords from each file name and storing them in a log.

examples.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs with Configurable Passwords
examples.description: Demonstrates how to read a list of PDF encryption jobs from a JSON configuration file, apply user and owner passwords with specific permissions, and log the results for each file.

examples.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs with a User Password
examples.description: Shows how to encrypt every PDF in a directory using the same user and owner passwords, applying specific permissions and saving the encrypted files to a separate folder.

examples.title: Change PDF Passwords with Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Shows how to open a password‑protected PDF, modify its user and owner passwords, and save the document with the new credentials using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Change PDF Version to 1.5 with Incremental Update
examples.description: Loads an existing PDF, creates a new document with PDF version 1.5, copies all pages, and saves the result using Aspose.Pdf's incremental update feature.

examples.title: Compress PDF with Default Settings
examples.description: Demonstrates how to reduce a PDF file size by applying Aspose.Pdf's default optimization (object compression) and saving the result, then compares the original and compressed sizes.

examples.title: Compress PDF with High Optimization Settings
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, applying high‑level compression via OptimizationOptions, and saving the result while reporting size reduction.

examples.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A-1b Preserving Structure and Fonts
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, set conversion options for PDF/A-1b while keeping the original document structure and embedded fonts, and save the resulting PDF/A-1b file.

examples.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A‑1b Compliance
examples.description: Loads a PDF file, converts it to PDF/A‑1b compliance while logging conversion errors, and saves the compliant document.

examples.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A-1b with Metadata Preservation
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, convert it to PDF/A-1b compliance while preserving its metadata, and save the resulting file using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A‑1b with Font Embedding
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, convert it to PDF/A‑1b compliance (automatically embedding missing fonts), and save the archival‑ready document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Convert PDF to PDF/X-3 with CMYK Color Space
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, convert it to PDF/X‑3 compliance while forcing all colors to CMYK using an ICC profile, and save the resulting file.

examples.title: Convert PDF to PDF/X‑3 Preserving ICC Profiles
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, converting it to PDF/X‑3 while keeping any existing ICC color profiles, and saving the result. Errors are logged to a file.

examples.title: Create PDF/A-1b Document with Text Paragraph
examples.description: The example creates a new PDF document, adds a text paragraph to the first page, converts the file to PDF/A‑1b compliance, and saves it.

examples.title: Create PDF/X‑3 Document with Three Pages
examples.description: Shows how to create a new PDF, add three blank pages, convert it to PDF/X‑3 compliance, and save the resulting file.

examples.title: Decrypt Encrypted PDF with User Password
examples.description: Shows how to open a password‑protected PDF using Aspose.Pdf, decrypt it, and save an unprotected copy.

examples.title: Download PDF from URL and Save Locally with Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Shows how to download a PDF file from a network URL using HttpClient, load it into an Aspose.Pdf Document from a stream, and save it to a local file.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑128 and Enable High‑Quality Printing
examples.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using AES‑128, set high‑quality printing permission, and verify the permission after opening the encrypted document.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑256 and Disable Printing
examples.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF using AES‑256, set custom permissions to disallow printing, and verify the encryption status.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with Form Filling Permission Only
examples.description: Loads an existing PDF, encrypts it with user and owner passwords, and sets permissions to allow only form filling while disabling content extraction, then saves the encrypted file.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF Allowing Only Form Filling
examples.description: Loads a PDF, applies AES‑256 encryption with permissions limited to form filling, and saves the protected document.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with Owner Password Only (AES-256)
examples.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF using Aspose.Pdf by setting only an owner password, disabling all user permissions, and applying AES‑256 encryption.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with 128‑bit RC4 and Verify Size Increase
examples.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF using 128‑bit RC4 encryption with Aspose.Pdf, then checks that the encrypted file size is slightly larger than the original.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with RC4 and Verify Permissions
examples.description: Demonstrates encrypting a PDF using the RC4 128‑bit algorithm, disabling all permissions, and programmatically verifying the security settings by testing password access.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF from Stream and Write to Output Stream
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF from an input stream, applying AES‑256 encryption with user and owner passwords, and saving the secured PDF to an output stream using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with User Password and Restrict Editing/Copying
examples.description: Demonstrates encrypting a PDF with a user password only, allowing printing while disabling editing and content extraction using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with Password and Form‑Fill Permission
examples.description: The example loads a PDF, applies user and owner passwords, grants only form‑filling permission while disabling printing, and saves the encrypted document using AES‑256 encryption.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with Passwords and Restrict Printing
examples.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using user and owner passwords, apply specific permissions, and disable printing using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Export PDF as PDF/X‑3 with Color Profiles
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, converting it to PDF/X‑3 compliance while preserving embedded color profiles, and saving the converted document.

examples.title: Export PDF Pages to Separate Files
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, iterate through its pages, and save each page as an individual PDF file using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Insert PDF Page into Another PDF at Specific Position
examples.description: Demonstrates how to insert a page from one PDF into another PDF at a given position using Aspose.Pdf's Pages.Insert method.

examples.title: Load PDF from Stream and Set Version to 1.4
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF from a MemoryStream, converting its PDF version to 1.4 using Document.Convert, and saving the updated file to disk.

examples.title: Load PDF with Custom LoadOptions and Save
examples.description: Demonstrates opening an existing PDF using HtmlLoadOptions (setting IsEmbedFonts to false) and then saving it back to PDF, including a file existence check.

examples.title: Open PDF from FileStream and Save to New File
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF document using a FileStream and saving it to another file with default settings using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Open PDF and Get Page Count
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF file from disk using Aspose.Pdf.Document and retrieve the total number of pages in the document.

examples.title: Open PDF Without Password and Handle InvalidPasswordException
examples.description: Demonstrates attempting to open a password‑protected PDF using Aspose.Pdf, catching the InvalidPasswordException, and handling the error gracefully.

examples.title: Remove Third Page from PDF
examples.description: Shows how to delete the third page of a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf and save the modified file.

examples.title: Rotate All PDF Pages 180 Degrees
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, rotate each page by 180 degrees, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Rotate Second Page of PDF by 90 Degrees
examples.description: Shows how to open a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, rotate the second page 90° clockwise, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Rotate Third PDF Page by 180 Degrees
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF (optionally from a byte array), rotate the third page 180 degrees, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Save PDF to MemoryStream and Write to File
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, saving it into a MemoryStream, and then writing the stream contents to a new file.

examples.title: Set PDF Document Title and Verify It
examples.description: Demonstrates how to open a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, set its document title metadata, save the file, and then reopen it to confirm the title was applied correctly.

examples.title: Set PDF Metadata (Author, Title, Subject)
examples.description: The example opens an existing PDF, sets its document information such as Author, Title, and Subject using Aspose.Pdf, saves the file, and then reopens it to verify the metadata.

examples.title: Split PDF into Two Parts at Page Ten
examples.description: Shows how to split a PDF into two separate documents at page 10 using Aspose.Pdf, including validation, page range extraction, and saving each part with descriptive filenames.

examples.title: Split PDF into Sections Using Page Ranges
examples.description: Demonstrates how to read page‑range definitions from a text file and split a source PDF into separate section PDFs using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Split PDF into Single‑Page Files
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a multi‑page PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, and save each page as an individual PDF file.

examples.title: Split PDF into Single-Page Files in Separate Folders
examples.description: Demonstrates how to split a large PDF into individual page PDFs, placing each page in its own folder using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Update PDF Author Metadata with Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Shows how to open a PDF file, modify its Author metadata, and overwrite the original file using Aspose.Pdf in C#.

examples.title: Update PDF Author Metadata
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, replace the Author metadata with the current user name, and save the updated document.

examples.title: Update PDF Title Metadata from Byte Array
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF from a byte array, changing its Title metadata, and saving the modified document to disk using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Compare Encrypted PDFs with Side‑by‑Side Visual Result
examples.description: Demonstrates loading password‑protected PDF files, comparing them using Aspose.Pdf's side‑by‑side comparer, and saving a visual diff PDF.

examples.title: Compare PDF Documents Page by Page and Generate Diff PDF
Align and Compare PDF Pages with Different Sizes
examples.description: The example loads two PDF documents, adjusts the second page to match the first page's dimensions, and uses Aspose.Pdf's GraphicalPdfComparer to compare the pages and generate a comparison PDF.

examples.title: Compare PDFs While Excluding Footer Areas
examples.description: Demonstrates how to exclude rectangular footer regions from a side‑by‑side PDF comparison using Aspose.Pdf's comparison options.

examples.title: Compare PDFs for Font Differences and Generate JSON Report
examples.description: Shows how to compare two PDF files, filter out font‑related differences, and export the diff operations to a JSON report using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Compare PDFs from Streams and Generate Diff PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load two PDF documents from in‑memory streams, perform a visual page‑by‑page comparison using GraphicalPdfComparer, and write the resulting diff PDF to a MemoryStream without creating temporary files.

examples.title: Compare PDFs Ignoring Compression Differences
examples.description: Shows how to compare two PDFs that use different compression settings, focusing on textual differences and producing both a visual diff PDF and a JSON diff report.

examples.title: Compare PDFs While Ignoring Signature Fields
examples.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF documents, verify their digital signatures, and exclude signature field regions from the visual diff using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Compare PDFs Including Form Field Values
examples.description: Shows how to compare two PDF files with Aspose.Pdf while taking AcroForm field values into account, producing a side‑by‑side visual diff and retrieving raw page‑level differences.

examples.title: Compare PDFs and Log Diff Operations by Page
examples.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF documents page‑by‑page using Aspose.Pdf and write an audit log that records each diff operation type together with its page number.

examples.title: Detect Unicode Text Differences Between PDFs
examples.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF files with different language encodings (e.g., English and Russian) using Aspose.Pdf.Comparison to detect Unicode text differences and generate a visual diff PDF.

examples.title: Compare Selected Page Range of Two PDFs
examples.description: Loads two PDF documents, adjusts a user‑defined page range, and performs a text‑based comparison on each page within that range.

examples.title: Compare Selected PDF Pages Using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates how to compare specific pages from two PDF documents by extracting those pages into temporary documents and using the side‑by‑side comparer provided by Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Compare Two PDFs and Generate a Visual Diff
examples.description: Loads two PDF files, compares them with Aspose.Pdf.Comparison, saves a diff PDF, and prints basic text‑difference statistics.

examples.title: Compare Two PDFs and Generate Visual Diff
examples.description: Loads two PDF files, compares them with Aspose.Pdf's flat document comparison, saves a PDF that highlights the differences, and prints a summary of the diff operations.

examples.title: Create Diff PDF Using GraphicalPdfComparer
examples.description: Loads two PDF files, compares them with Aspose.Pdf's GraphicalPdfComparer, and saves a diff PDF that highlights the changes to a specified folder.

examples.title: Exclude Annotations from PDF Comparison
examples.description: Shows how to collect annotation bounding rectangles from two PDFs and configure side‑by‑side comparison to ignore those areas using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Exclude Areas from PDF Side‑by‑Side Comparison
examples.description: Shows how to define rectangular regions to exclude from both PDFs and perform a side‑by‑side comparison using Aspose.Pdf.Comparison.

examples.title: Generate Diff PDF with Highlighted Text Changes
examples.description: Demonstrates comparing two PDFs, creating a diff PDF with highlighted text changes using Aspose.Pdf, and verifying that the highlight colour matches the default yellow.

examples.title: Generate Visual Difference Image Between Two PDFs
examples.description: Demonstrates how to compare the first pages of two PDF files using Aspose.Pdf's GraphicalPdfComparer, obtain an ImagesDifference object, and save a PNG that visualizes the pixel‑wise differences.

examples.title: Generate Visual Diff PDF Using GraphicalPdfComparer
examples.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF documents visually and create a diff PDF using Aspose.Pdf's GraphicalPdfComparer.

examples.title: Multi‑Threaded PDF Comparison with Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates how to compare multiple PDF pairs concurrently using Aspose.Pdf's side‑by‑side comparison API and .NET tasks, saving each result to a separate file.

examples.title: Parallel Batch PDF Comparison with Concurrency Limit
examples.description: Compares multiple PDF files against a baseline PDF in parallel while limiting the degree of parallelism to control memory usage, and saves side‑by‑side comparison results.

examples.title: Generate PDF Diff Images and Zip Them
examples.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDFs with Aspose.Pdf, create visual diff images, and package the images into a ZIP archive for easy distribution.

examples.title: Generate PDF Difference Report in JSON
examples.description: The example loads two PDF files, compares page count and page dimensions, records any differences, and writes a JSON report of the diff operations.

examples.title: Preserve PDF Metadata After Comparison
examples.description: Shows how to compare two PDFs side‑by‑side using Aspose.Pdf and then copy the original document's metadata to the generated diff PDF.

examples.title: Replace Changed Text in PDF Using DiffOperation
examples.description: Compares two PDF pages, extracts the original text from the first PDF via DiffOperation objects, and replaces the changed content on the second PDF with the original text.

examples.title: Set Custom Image Similarity Tolerance for PDF Comparison
examples.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDFs containing scanned images using Aspose.Pdf's GraphicalPdfComparer with a custom similarity tolerance.

examples.title: Write PDF Diff Directly to HTTP Response Stream
examples.description: Demonstrates comparing two PDFs side‑by‑side and writing the resulting diff PDF directly to a provided output stream, suitable for ASP.NET Core response bodies.

examples.title: Add File Attachment and Convert to PDF/A‑3b
examples.description: Demonstrates how to embed an external text file into a PDF/A‑3b document using Aspose.Pdf, then convert the document to PDF/A‑3b compliance and save it.

examples.title: Add Logo to PDF and Convert to PPTX
examples.description: Loads a PDF, stamps a semi‑transparent company logo on each page, and then converts the modified document to a PPTX file using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add XML Attachment to PDF/A-1b Document
examples.description: Shows how to convert a PDF to PDF/A‑1b and embed an external XML file as a file‑attachment annotation on a page.

examples.title: Batch Convert PDFs to JPEG Images with Custom Naming
examples.description: Demonstrates how to enumerate PDF files in a folder, convert each page to a JPEG image using Aspose.Pdf, and save the images with a custom <pdfname>_page<number>.jpeg naming pattern.

examples.title: Batch Convert PDFs to Multi‑Page TIFF
examples.description: Shows how to iterate through a folder of PDF files and convert each document into a multi‑page TIFF archive using Aspose.Pdf's Document and TiffDevice classes.

examples.title: Batch Convert PDFs to PNG Preserving Folder Hierarchy
examples.description: Shows how to recursively locate PDF files, keep their relative directory structure, and convert each page to PNG images using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Batch Convert PDFs to PPTX with SlidesAsImages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to convert multiple PDF files in a folder to PPTX format, rendering each slide as an image by enabling the SlidesAsImages option.

examples.title: Convert EPUB to PDF with Custom Page Size
examples.description: Demonstrates loading an EPUB file with EpubLoadOptions to set a custom page size and saving it as a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Convert LaTeX (.tex) to PDF with Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Shows how to load a .tex file using TeXLoadOptions and convert it to a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Convert Markdown to PDF with Code Block Preservation
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a Markdown file using MdLoadOptions and converting it to a PDF document while preserving code blocks.

examples.title: Convert OFD to PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load an OFD document using OfdLoadOptions and save it as a PDF with default settings using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Convert PCL to PDF with HP‑GL/2 Vectors
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PCL file (including HP‑GL/2 vector graphics) using Aspose.Pdf and saving it as a PDF document.

examples.title: Convert PDF Page Region to PNG Image
examples.description: Shows how to extract a specific rectangular area from a PDF page and save it as a PNG file using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Convert PDF Page to JPEG Image
examples.description: Demonstrates how to convert a specific page of a PDF document to a JPEG image using Aspose.Pdf's JpegDevice with the default DPI.

examples.title: Convert PDF Pages to GIF Images
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and convert each page to a GIF image using the GifDevice with default parameters.

examples.title: Convert PDF Pages to Separate HTML Files
examples.description: Demonstrates how to convert each page of a PDF into an individual HTML file using Aspose.Pdf's HtmlSaveOptions with SplitIntoPages enabled.

examples.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF containing auto‑numbered headings and then sanitize the document by removing annotations, metadata, and flattening form fields while preserving the heading structure.

examples.title: Create Searchable PDF from Scanned Images using OCR Overlay
examples.description: Shows how to load a scanned PDF, run OCR on each page to generate an invisible text layer, and save the result as a searchable PDF.

examples.title: Create ZUGFeRD PDF Invoice with Embedded XML
examples.description: Shows how to build a simple invoice PDF, add text elements, embed a ZUGFeRD XML file, convert the document to ZUGFeRD format, and save the resulting PDF.

examples.title: Customize Crash Report Filename and Message with Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Shows how to set a custom message and override the default filename when generating an HTML crash report using Aspose.Pdf's CrashReportOptions.

examples.title: Detect Hidden Annotations in a PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and iterating through its pages and annotations to determine if any annotation has the Hidden flag set.

examples.title: Digitally Sign PDF with Timestamp from TSA
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a PKCS#7 digital signature to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and include a trusted Time‑Stamp Authority timestamp.

examples.title: Embed ZUGFeRD XML into PDF and Verify Attachment
examples.description: Demonstrates how to attach a ZUGFeRD XML file to an existing PDF as an invisible file‑attachment annotation, save the result, and confirm the embedded file using Aspose.Pdf's EmbeddedFiles collection.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑256 and Restrict Printing/Copying
examples.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using AES‑256 with Aspose.Pdf, set user and owner passwords, and limit permissions to prevent printing and copying.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with User and Owner Passwords
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, apply AES‑256 encryption with separate user and owner passwords, set specific permissions, and save the protected document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Extract Embedded Files from PDF Portfolio
examples.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through a PDF portfolio's embedded files and save each one to a local directory, using Aspose.Pdf with reflection for flexibility.

examples.title: Extract Hyperlinks from PDF to Text File
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages and link annotations, collect external URI actions, and write the URLs to a plain‑text file.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Save as PNG
examples.description: Shows how to iterate through PDF pages, retrieve embedded XImage resources, and render each image to a PNG file while preserving its original resolution using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Extract and Print PDF Outline Hierarchy
examples.description: Shows how to create a PDF with bookmarks (outlines) and then read and display the outline hierarchy using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Extract Text from Specific PDF Page Range
examples.description: Shows how to extract text from a defined range of pages in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and write the result to a UTF‑8 text file.

examples.title: Extract Text from PDF and Save as UTF-8 File
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract all textual content using a TextAbsorber, and write the result to a UTF‑8 encoded text file.

examples.title: Extract XMP Metadata from PDF to XML
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, retrieve its embedded XMP metadata, and save it as an XML file.

examples.title: Flatten PDF Form Fields to Static Content
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, flattening all interactive form fields into static content, and saving the resulting PDF.

examples.title: Generate Accessible PDF with Headings, Paragraphs, and Table
examples.description: Shows how to create a PDF and add accessibility tags for a level‑1 heading, a paragraph, and a table using Aspose.Pdf's tagging API.

examples.title: Generate Crash Report for PDF Exceptions
examples.description: Demonstrates how to catch a PdfException, configure CrashReportOptions, and generate an HTML crash report file using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Generate Crash Report to Network Share with Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Shows how to configure CrashReportOptions to write an Aspose.Pdf crash report to a network share, with fallback to a local folder and verification of the generated file.

examples.title: Generate PDF Crash Report from an Exception
examples.description: Shows how to capture an exception, create an HTML crash report with Aspose.Pdf's CrashReportOptions, and convert that report into a PDF file.

examples.title: Generate PDF Crash Report with Custom Message
examples.description: Demonstrates catching a PDF loading error and creating an HTML crash report using Aspose.Pdf's CrashReportOptions with a custom message.

examples.title: Handle PDF Errors and Generate Crash Report
examples.description: The example loads a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, performs simple processing, and demonstrates robust error handling by catching PdfException and generic exceptions, then creates a detailed HTML crash report.

examples.title: Insert Automatic Page Numbers into PDF
examples.description: Shows how to add a page number stamp to a PDF, apply it to existing and newly inserted pages, and update pagination so the numbers adjust automatically.

examples.title: Insert Blank Cover Page into PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, insert an empty page at the beginning as a cover sheet, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Insert High‑Resolution Image into PDF with Absolute Positioning
examples.description: Shows how to create a high‑resolution bitmap in memory, encode it as JPEG, and place it on a PDF page at specific coordinates using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Insert a PDF Page into Another PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to copy a specific page from one PDF document and insert it at a given position in another PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Interrupt and Resume Large PDF Save Operation
examples.description: Shows how to cancel a long‑running PDF save using Aspose.Pdf's async API and an InterruptMonitor, then release resources and resume the save later.

examples.title: Load PDF into Document
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF file into an Aspose.Pdf Document object and retrieve basic information such as page count.

examples.title: Merge Two PDFs While Preserving Bookmarks
examples.description: Shows how to combine two PDF files into a single document using Aspose.Pdf, keeping the outlines/bookmarks from both source PDFs.

examples.title: Create PDF with Merged Header Table
examples.description: Shows how to generate a PDF that contains a header table with a single cell spanning multiple columns, followed by a regular data table, using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Create PDF Header with Current Date Using JavaScript
examples.description: Shows how to add a shared DateField in the header of a PDF and populate it with the current date via page‑level JavaScript using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: PDF Sanitization with Auditing Log
examples.description: Demonstrates how to sanitize a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, record the operation's start and end timestamps, and write an audit entry to a log file.

examples.title: Print PDF Document Using OS Print Verb
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and dispatch it to the default printer using the operating system's "print" verb from a .NET application.

examples.title: Rasterize PDF Pages to PNG with Lossless Compression
examples.description: The example loads a PDF, configures ImageCompressionOptions for lossless PNG output, optimizes the document, and rasterizes each page to PNG files at a specified DPI.

examples.title: Remove All Annotations from a PDF
examples.description: Loads a PDF document, iterates through each page, deletes every annotation, and saves a clean copy without any markup.

examples.title: Remove All Annotations from PDF
examples.description: Loads a PDF document, iterates through each page, deletes all annotations, and saves the sanitized file.

examples.title: Remove Annotations and Attachments from PDF

examples.title: Remove Hidden Data and Re‑Apply Headings in a PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, stripping hidden metadata, outlines, and unused resources, then enabling auto‑tagging to recreate heading structures for proper navigation before saving the cleaned file.

examples.title: Remove JavaScript from PDF Document
examples.description: Demonstrates how to strip all JavaScript actions—including document‑level, page‑level, and annotation‑level scripts—from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, then saves the cleaned file.

examples.title: Remove a Page from PDF and Renumber Remaining Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to delete a specific page from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and automatically renumber the remaining pages before saving the result.

examples.title: Replace Existing Image in PDF Page

examples.description: Demonstrates how to replace a specific page in an existing PDF with a page generated from HTML using Aspose.Pdf's HTML conversion capabilities.

examples.title: Replace Text in PDF While Preserving Formatting
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, searching for a specific word using TextFragmentAbsorber, replacing each occurrence while keeping the original formatting, and saving the updated document.

examples.title: Rotate PDF Pages 90 Degrees for Portrait Display
examples.description: Loads a PDF document, sets each page's rotation to 90 degrees so it appears in portrait orientation on landscape devices, and saves the modified file.

examples.title: Sanitize Multiple PDFs and Save Cleaned Versions
examples.description: Demonstrates loading all PDF files from a folder, removing metadata, compliance tags, form fields, and unused resources, then saving the sanitized copies to a target directory using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Sanitize PDF by Removing Embedded Scripts
examples.description: Demonstrates how to configure Aspose.Pdf's hidden data sanitization to delete embedded JavaScript and actions from a PDF before saving the sanitized document.

examples.title: Sanitize PDF by Removing Hidden Content While Keeping Metadata
examples.description: Shows how to configure Aspose.Pdf's optimization options to strip hidden data such as private info, unused objects/streams, and PDF/A/UA compliance markers while preserving the document metadata.

examples.title: Sanitize PDF by Removing Metadata and Private Info
examples.description: Demonstrates how to clear PDF metadata, compliance flags, and private search index data using Aspose.Pdf's optimization options.

examples.title: Sanitize PDF by Removing Metadata and Flattening Content
examples.description: Demonstrates a console application that loads a PDF, removes hidden metadata, compliance information, flattens forms, optimizes resources, and saves a sanitized copy.

examples.title: Set PDF Document Metadata (Creation Date, Modification Date, Keywords)
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, set its creation and modification dates, add custom keywords, and save the updated file.

examples.title: Set PDF Expiration Date with JavaScript
examples.description: Shows how to embed a JavaScript action in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf so the document automatically closes after a specified expiration date.

examples.description: Shows how to set a custom directory and filename for an Aspose.Pdf crash report, generate the report, and confirm the file exists.

examples.title: Validate PDF for PDF/A-1A Compliance and Generate Report

Export Annotations to XFDF When PDF Has No Annotations

examples.title: Set PDF Viewer Preferences: Thumbnails Pane and Fit Width
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use PdfContentEditor to configure viewer preferences so the PDF opens with the thumbnails pane visible and the window sized to fit the page width.

examples.title: Set PDF Window Title via DisplayDocTitle Viewer Preference

examples.title: Set Viewer Preference and Default Zoom for PDF

examples.title: Silently Print PDF to Network Printer
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and dispatch it to a network printer using a UNC path, suppressing all UI dialogs for silent printing.

examples.title: Split PDF into Single-Page Files with Annotations
examples.description: Shows how to split an edited PDF into separate one‑page PDF files while preserving all annotations using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Toggle FullScreen Viewer Preference in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to enable or disable the FullScreen viewer preference of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor and related APIs.

examples.title: Toggle PDF Viewer Preferences with Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: The example reads a PDF's current viewer preferences, presents them as toggleable options, modifies selected flags, and saves the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Underline Specific Phrase on PDF Page
examples.description: Shows how to locate a given phrase on the fourth page of a PDF and add an underline annotation using Aspose.Pdf's Facades API.

examples.title: Update PDF XMP Creator Metadata
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load existing XMP metadata from a PDF, modify the dc:creator field, and save the PDF with the updated metadata using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Validate PDF Integrity After Adding Margins

examples.title: Verify PDF Attachment After Save
examples.description: Demonstrates adding a file attachment to a PDF with PdfContentEditor, saving the document, and confirming the attachment exists using PdfExtractor in a unit test.

examples.title: Verify Text Annotation Position on PDF Page
examples.description: Shows how to add a text (sticky‑note) annotation to a PDF with PdfContentEditor and assert its rectangle coordinates in a unit test.

examples.title: Asynchronously Extract Text and Images from PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor with async/await to extract all text, per‑page text files, and images from a PDF without blocking the UI thread.

examples.title: Asynchronous PDF Text Extraction with Cancellation Support
examples.description: Demonstrates extracting text from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor while honoring a CancellationToken, allowing the operation to be aborted on user request.

examples.title: Batch Extract Text from PDFs to Text Files
examples.description: Shows how to iterate over a directory of PDF files, extract their text using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, and write each output to a .txt file with the same name.

examples.description: Demonstrates how to enumerate PDF files in an Azure Blob container, extract their text using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, and upload the resulting .txt files back to the container.

examples.title: Check if PDF Contains Text Using PdfExtractor
examples.description: Shows how to bind a PDF to Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, extract its text into a MemoryStream, and determine if any text was found.

examples.title: Check PDF for Text and Images using PdfExtractor
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to determine whether a PDF file contains both textual content and images.

examples.title: Check if PDF is Text‑Only by Extracting Images
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to detect images in a PDF and determine whether the document contains only text.

examples.title: Configurable PDF Text, Image, and Attachment Extraction
examples.description: Shows how to read a JSON configuration file to enable or disable extraction of text, images, and attachments from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor facade.

examples.title: Convert PDF to Multi‑Page TIFF for Archival
examples.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF, configure lossless TIFF settings, and save all pages as a single multi‑page TIFF file using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Create A Rest Api Endpoint That Receives A Pdf Byte Array And Returns Extracted Text As Json
Create Contact Sheet PDF from Extracted Images
examples.description: Extracts all images from a source PDF and assembles them into a contact sheet PDF with thumbnails arranged in a configurable grid.

examples.title: Create PDF Summary from First Three Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates extracting text from the first three pages of a PDF using PdfExtractor and generating a new PDF that contains the extracted text as a summary document.

examples.description: Shows how to extract all images from a PDF and save them as JPEG files with a quality setting of 85 using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Extract Embedded Attachments from PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to extract all file attachments embedded in a PDF and save each one to a specified output directory.

examples.description: Demonstrates extracting all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and generating PNG thumbnails with a maximum dimension of 200 × 200 pixels.

examples.title: Extract Images From A Pdf And Embed Them Into An Html Report Using Base64 Data Uris
Extract Images from Encrypted PDF

examples.title: Extract Images from First PDF Page to Byte Arrays

examples.description: The example uses Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to pull all images from a PDF, converts each image to a Base64 string, and writes a formatted JSON file containing the image data and metadata.

examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to pull images from a PDF while preserving their original format by setting the ExtractImageMode to DefinedInResources.

examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to convert each PDF page to an image, save the images, and generate a CSV file that lists each image's file name, page number, and dimensions.

examples.description: Demonstrates extracting all images from each PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, saving them as PNG files, and creating a CSV file that lists the image filename, page number, width, and height.

examples.description: Shows how to extract all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and generate a simple HTML page that displays the extracted images.

examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to pull all images from a PDF, turn each image stream into a Base64 string, and serialize the collection as JSON.
