examples.description: Shows how to log each page's width, height, and rotation before and after applying changes with PdfPageEditor, then rotate all pages and save an audit log.

examples.title: Batch Convert PDFs to A4 Page Size
examples.description: Shows how to loop through multiple PDF files and use PdfPageEditor to resize every page to A4, saving the converted documents to a designated folder.

examples.title: Batch Resize PDF Pages Based on Filename Keywords
examples.description: Shows how to iterate through PDFs in a folder, pick a target page size from a keyword map derived from the file name, and apply that size to all pages using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor.

examples.title: Batch Set Fade Transition for PDF Slideshow
examples.description: Demonstrates how to apply a Fade (Dissolve) page transition with a 2‑second duration to all pages of a 200‑page PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Center Align PDF Page and Set Display Duration
examples.description: Demonstrates how to center‑align the content of a specific PDF page and set its display duration to four seconds using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade.

examples.title: Center Content on Specific PDF Page
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to horizontally center the existing content of page 2 in a PDF document.

examples.title: Chain Page Transformations (Rotation, Zoom, Size) with PdfPageEditor
examples.description: Demonstrates how to apply multiple page modifications—rotation, zoom, size, and position shift—using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor before saving the updated PDF.

examples.title: Convert PDF Page from Portrait to Landscape
examples.description: Shows how to change a PDF page's size to landscape by swapping width and height with PdfPageEditor, rotating the content, and confirming the new dimensions.

examples.title: Convert PDF Page Orientation to Landscape (A4)
examples.description: Shows how to change a PDF's page orientation from portrait to landscape by setting the A4 page size and enabling the landscape flag using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Create ContentsResizeParameters with Uniform Margins
examples.description: Shows how to instantiate a ContentsResizeParameters object with absolute margin values of five points for left, right, top, and bottom sides using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Create PDF Slideshow with Page Transitions
examples.description: Shows how to convert a PDF into a slideshow by configuring page transition type, transition duration, and display duration using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor.

examples.title: Create Uniform 15% Margin Resize Parameters
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a ContentsResizeParameters object with 15% margins on all sides using the MarginsPercent method, which can then be passed to PdfFileEditor methods for content scaling.

examples.title: Disable Page Transition Animation in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to set the transition duration to zero for a specific page using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor, thereby disabling the page transition animation.

examples.title: Edit PDF In-Memory Using PdfPageEditor
examples.description: Shows how to create a PDF in memory, bind it to PdfPageEditor, apply zoom and rotation to all pages, and save the edited document to another memory stream.

examples.title: Edit PDF Pages with PdfPageEditor and Proper Disposal
examples.description: Shows how to rotate and zoom PDF pages using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor while correctly disposing the editor and document to release file handles.

examples.title: Edit PDF Pages with Zoom and Rotation using PdfPageEditor
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, apply zoom and rotation to its pages with PdfPageEditor, and save the edited document to a new file.

examples.title: Edit PDF and Preserve Original with Backup
examples.description: Creates a backup of the source PDF, modifies the document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor (e.g., changes zoom), and saves the edited version as a new file while keeping the original unchanged.

examples.title: Extract and Rotate Selected PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to extract specific pages from a PDF, rotate those pages, and save the result as a new PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Handle Invalid Page Rotation with PdfPageEditor
examples.description: Demonstrates how to safely set a page rotation using PdfPageEditor and catch invalid rotation values to avoid runtime errors.

examples.title: Hybrid Content Resize with Mixed Percent and Unit Margins
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a ContentsResizeParameters object with both percentage‑based and absolute margins and apply it to all pages using PdfFileEditor.ResizeContents.

examples.title: Incrementally Update PDF with Text Annotation
examples.description: Demonstrates adding a text annotation to a PDF and saving the changes using incremental update mode to preserve the original file structure.

examples.title: Left Align Page Two in PDF using PdfPageEditor
examples.description: Demonstrates how to left‑justify the content of the second page of a PDF document by using the PdfPageEditor facade and its HorizontalAlignment property.

examples.title: Load PDF and Apply Edits with PdfPageEditor
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF file, binding it to PdfPageEditor, optionally configuring rotation, zoom, or page size, applying the changes, and saving the edited document.

examples.title: Log PDF Page Property Modifications
examples.description: Demonstrates how to rotate PDF pages, change their background color, and record each change to a log file for audit and debugging using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Merge PDFs with Uniform Margins
examples.description: Shows how to add consistent margins to multiple PDF files and then concatenate them into a single document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Modify Pages in Signed PDF While Preserving Signatures
examples.description: Demonstrates how to rotate, zoom, and resize pages of a digitally signed PDF using PdfPageEditor, saving the changes as an incremental update to keep existing signatures valid.

examples.title: Report Page Properties Before and After Editing PDF
examples.description: Shows how to read page size, rotation, and zoom values, apply rotation, zoom, and size changes with PdfPageEditor, and generate a before/after report.

examples.title: Reset Rotation of a Specific PDF Page
examples.description: Shows how to reset the rotation of page 6 in a PDF document to 0 degrees using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade.

examples.title: Resize PDF Contents Only on Pages Containing Text
examples.description: Scans a PDF to find pages that contain text and then resizes the contents of only those pages using PdfFileEditor with margin parameters.

examples.title: Resize Last PDF Page to A5 for Booklet
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to change the size of the final page of a PDF to A5, creating a compact booklet format.

examples.title: Resize PDF Pages and Split into Chapter Files
examples.description: Demonstrates how to uniformly resize all pages of a PDF and then split the resized document into separate chapter PDFs using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Resize PDF Contents with Asymmetric Margins
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor to resize page contents with different left and right margins (asymmetric design) while keeping top and bottom margins proportional.

examples.title: Resize PDF Contents and Rotate Pages by 90 Degrees
examples.description: Shows how to shrink PDF page contents to a specified percentage and then rotate all pages 90° using Aspose.Pdf facades.

examples.title: Resize PDF Contents with Top and Bottom Margins
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor to resize page contents by specifying separate top and bottom margins, including creating a sample PDF when none exists.

examples.title: Resize PDF Page Contents with Uniform Margins
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor to resize the contents of all pages in a PDF, applying equal 10% margins on each side.

examples.title: Resize PDF Page and Revert to Original Size
examples.description: Shows how to change a PDF page's dimensions with PdfPageEditor, save the resized file, then restore the original size to verify undo functionality.

examples.title: Resize PDF Page Contents with 10% Margins
examples.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor to resize the contents of all pages in a PDF by applying a 10% margin on each side.

examples.title: Resize PDF Page Contents by 5% Using PdfFileEditor
examples.description: Demonstrates how to uniformly shrink all page elements by 5% using the PdfFileEditor facade's ResizeContentsPct method.

examples.title: Resize PDF Page Contents with Custom Margins
examples.description: Demonstrates how to resize the contents of specific PDF pages (pages 2 and 4) using custom left and right margins with Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor.

examples.title: Resize PDF Pages While Preserving Annotations
examples.description: Demonstrates how to change the page size of a PDF (e.g., to A4) using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade while keeping existing content and annotations intact.

examples.title: Resize PDF Pages to A4
examples.description: Loads a PDF from a byte array, sets every page to A4 portrait dimensions, and saves the modified document to a new file.

examples.title: Resize Specific PDF Page to Letter Size
examples.description: Shows how to use PdfPageEditor to change the size of a single page (page 6) in a PDF to Letter dimensions and save the modified document.

examples.title: Resize Specific PDF Pages to US Letter Size
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to change the page size of pages 3‑6 to US Letter dimensions (8.5" x 11").

examples.title: Retrieve Page Size After Rotation
examples.description: Loads a PDF, reads the original size of the first page, rotates the page by 90° using PdfPageEditor, then obtains the new page size to confirm the orientation change and saves the modified document.

examples.title: Retrieve PDF Page Rotation
examples.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF file with PdfPageEditor and obtain the rotation angle of a specific page (page 4) using GetPageRotation.

examples.title: Retrieve Size of a Specific PDF Page
examples.description: Shows how to bind a PDF with PdfPageEditor and call GetPageSize to obtain the width and height of page 2 for logging.

examples.title: Retrieve and Verify Page Rotation After Resizing PDF Page
examples.description: Loads a PDF, captures the original rotation of a page, changes the page size with PdfPageEditor, and confirms that the rotation value remains unchanged after the resize.

examples.title: Revert PDF Page Size to Original Dimensions
examples.description: Shows how to capture a page's original size, modify it, and then restore the original dimensions using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade.

examples.title: Rotate Every Third PDF Page by 270°
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to select every third page of a PDF and rotate it 270 degrees, creating alternating landscape orientation.

examples.title: Rotate First Page of PDFs in a Folder
examples.description: Shows how to batch‑process PDF files in a directory and rotate the first page of each document by 90 degrees using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

examples.title: Rotate Landscape PDF Pages to Portrait
examples.description: Shows how to detect landscape pages in a PDF and rotate them 90 degrees to portrait orientation using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

examples.title: Rotate Pages of Encrypted PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates opening an encrypted PDF by providing a password, binding it to PdfPageEditor, rotating all pages 90 degrees, and saving the edited document.

examples.title: Rotate PDF Page 180° While Preserving Transition
examples.description: Demonstrates how to rotate a specific PDF page by 180 degrees using the PdfPageEditor facade without affecting any existing transition effects on the page.

examples.title: Rotate PDF Page and Restore Original Orientation
examples.description: Shows how to rotate a PDF page using PdfPageEditor, save the rotated file, then reset the rotation to its original value and save the restored document.

examples.title: Rotate PDF Pages to Landscape for Brochure Printing
examples.description: Shows how to rotate all pages of a PDF to landscape orientation and set the page size to A4 using the PdfPageEditor facade, preparing the document for brochure printing.

examples.title: Rotate PDF Pages from a Network Stream using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates downloading a PDF via HttpClient, loading it into a MemoryStream, rotating all pages with PdfPageEditor, and saving the modified document back to the same stream.

examples.title: Rotate PDF Pages Using PdfPageEditor from a Memory Stream
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF into a MemoryStream, binding it to Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor, rotating all pages, and saving the result without writing the original file back to disk.

examples.title: Rotate PDF Pages While Preserving Form Data
examples.description: Demonstrates how to export form fields to FDF, rotate all pages, and re‑import the fields so that form data remains correctly positioned after the rotation.

examples.title: Rotate PDF Pages Using PdfPageEditor
examples.description: Shows how to rotate all pages of a PDF by setting the Rotation property of PdfPageEditor, applying changes, and saving the modified document.

examples.title: Rotate PDF Pages with Validation using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates how to validate a rotation angle (0, 90, 180, 270) and apply it to all pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

examples.title: Rotate and Resize PDF Page to Letter
examples.description: Shows how to rotate page 3 of a PDF by 90 degrees and change its dimensions to Letter size using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor class.

examples.title: Rotate, Resize and Zoom PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to rotate pages, change page size, apply a zoom factor, and save the transformed PDF.

examples.title: Rotate Specific PDF Page Using PdfPageEditor
examples.description: Shows how to rotate page 2 of a PDF by 90 degrees using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor and its PageRotations dictionary.

examples.title: Rotate Specific PDF Page Using PdfPageEditor
examples.description: Demonstrates how to rotate page 4 of a PDF document by 180 degrees using the PdfPageEditor facade and save the result.

examples.title: Rotate Specific PDF Pages by 180 Degrees
examples.description: Shows how to rotate selected pages (3, 5, and 7) of a PDF by 180° using the PdfPageEditor facade.

examples.title: Safely Retrieve PDF Page Size with Try‑Catch
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor to obtain page dimensions while handling requests for non‑existent pages using try‑catch blocks. Includes creation of a sample PDF for testing.

examples.title: Save Modified PDF to MemoryStream Using PdfPageEditor
examples.description: Demonstrates how to edit a PDF page's zoom factor with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor and save the resulting document directly into a MemoryStream for further in‑memory processing.

examples.title: Set BoxOut Transition and Zoom on a PDF Page
examples.description: Shows how to apply a BoxOut page transition with a 1.3 zoom factor to a specific page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

examples.title: Set Custom Page Size with PdfPageEditor
examples.description: Demonstrates how to change a PDF's page dimensions to non‑standard values using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor and the PageSize property.

examples.title: Set Display Duration for a PDF Page
examples.description: Demonstrates how to set the display duration of a specific PDF page (page 5) to five seconds using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

examples.title: Set Display Duration for PDF Pages (Slideshow)
examples.description: Shows how to assign a display duration to each page of a PDF using PdfPageEditor, enabling a timed slideshow presentation.

examples.title: Set Display Duration on Even PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to set a custom display duration for only the even-numbered pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor.

examples.title: Set Horizontal Alignment of PDF Page Content
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use the PdfPageEditor facade to change the horizontal alignment (left, center, right) of all content on a PDF page and save the modified document.

examples.title: Set Horizontal Alignment and Zoom for a Specific PDF Page
examples.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to center‑align content and apply a zoom factor to page 4 of a PDF document.

examples.title: Set Page Transition Duration Based on Title Length
examples.description: The example loads a PDF, iterates through its pages, creates a placeholder title, calculates a transition duration from the title length, and applies a page transition using the PdfPageEditor facade.

examples.title: Set Page Transition to Fade with 2‑Second Duration
examples.description: Shows how to apply a Fade transition lasting two seconds to the first page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

examples.title: Set Page Transition Effects (Fade, BoxOut, Cover) in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates applying different page transition types (Fade/Dissolve, BoxOut, Cover) to specific pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

examples.title: Set PDF Page Size to A4 Landscape
examples.description: Shows how to change all pages of a PDF to custom A4 landscape dimensions using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor and the PageSize class.

examples.title: Set PDF Page Size to A3 Using PdfPageEditor
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, change its page size to A3 with the PdfPageEditor facade, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Set PDF Page Size to Letter Portrait
examples.description: Shows how to change all pages of a PDF to the standard Letter portrait dimensions (8.5" x 11") using the Aspose.Pdf PdfPageEditor facade.

examples.title: Set PDF Page Zoom to 100% Using PdfPageEditor
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with PdfPageEditor, set the Zoom property to 1.0 (100 % scaling) for all pages, apply the changes, and save the updated file.

examples.title: Set PDF Page Zoom Using PdfPageEditor
examples.description: Demonstrates how to apply a precise zoom factor to a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor for high‑resolution scaling.

examples.title: Set PDF Zoom for Preview and Scale for Final Output
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a preview PDF with 50 % zoom using PdfPageEditor and configuring a PdfViewer with 100 % scale for final output.

examples.title: Set Per‑Page Display Duration Based on Word Count
examples.description: Demonstrates how to calculate a display duration for each PDF page proportional to its word count and apply it using Aspose.Pdf facades, enabling controlled reading time per page.

examples.title: Set Per-Page Display Duration in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to assign a different display duration to each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor, increasing the duration by one second for each subsequent page.

examples.title: Set Slide Display Duration for PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to assign a per‑page display duration (and optional transition) to a PDF presentation using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor.

examples.title: Set Transition Duration for a Range of PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to select specific pages via the Pages collection and set each page's transition duration to one second using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade.

examples.title: Set Zoom on Specific PDF Page Using PdfPageEditor
examples.description: Shows how to apply a 2.0 zoom factor (200% magnification) to page 7 of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

examples.title: Set Zoom of Page 5 to 75% with PdfPageEditor
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to set the zoom level of a specific page (page 5) to 75% and save the modified PDF.

examples.title: Vertically Align Page 3 to Top
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor to set the vertical alignment of page 3 to the top and save the modified PDF.

examples.title: Zoom Odd-Numbered PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to apply a 1.2x zoom factor to odd‑numbered pages of a PDF document.

examples.title: Zoom Pages Containing Images in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to detect pages that contain image objects in a PDF and apply a zoom factor only to those pages using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades API.

examples.title: Zoom Selected Non-Consecutive PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to select specific non‑consecutive pages of a PDF using PdfPageEditor.ProcessPages and apply a common zoom factor to those pages.

examples.title: Add Text Annotation to Encrypted PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates opening a PDF with optional owner password handling, adding a text annotation to the first page, and saving the modified document.

examples.title: Apply Password Protection to PDF Using PdfFileSecurity
examples.description: Shows how to encrypt an existing PDF with user and owner passwords using the PdfFileSecurity facade, avoiding the creation of a Document object.

examples.title: Batch Decrypt PDFs Using Owner Passwords from Config
examples.description: Demonstrates how to read a JSON configuration file and batch‑decrypt multiple PDF files using their owner passwords with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs with User and Owner Passwords
examples.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt all PDF files in a folder using Aspose.Pdf by applying the same user and owner passwords with AES‑256 protection. The code iterates through each PDF, saves the encrypted copy to an output directory, and enables printing.

examples.title: Batch Update PDF User Passwords
examples.description: Iterates through all PDF files in a folder and applies a standardized user password to each document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Change PDF Owner Password While Preserving User Password
examples.description: Shows how to iterate over multiple PDF files and update their owner passwords using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, keeping the existing user passwords unchanged.

examples.title: Change PDF User and Owner Passwords from CSV
examples.description: Demonstrates how to read a CSV list of PDFs and use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to change both the user and owner passwords, saving the secured files to new locations.

examples.title: Change User and Owner Passwords in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to change both the user and owner passwords of an existing PDF in a single call using the PdfFileSecurity.ChangePassword overload.

examples.title: Change User Password of Encrypted PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to change the user password of an already encrypted PDF while keeping the original owner password and encryption settings using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Check PDF Encryption and Perform Encrypt/Decrypt
examples.description: Demonstrates how to inspect a PDF's IsEncrypted flag with PdfFileInfo and then encrypt or decrypt the document using the Document API based on that status.

examples.title: Check PDF for Extended Usage Rights
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, bind it to the PdfFileSignature facade, and determine whether the document contains extended usage rights using ContainsUsageRights.

examples.title: Decrypt PDF with Owner Password using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Shows how to unlock and decrypt an encrypted PDF file by providing the owner password with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSecurity.

examples.title: Disable Copying While Enabling Printing for PDF
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSecurity to allow printing but prevent content copying in a PDF document.

examples.title: Encrypt and Decrypt PDF to Verify Integrity
examples.description: Demonstrates encrypting a PDF with user and owner passwords using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSecurity, then decrypting it and performing a simple round‑trip integrity check.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with 256‑bit AES and passwords
examples.description: Shows how to encrypt an existing PDF using 256‑bit AES, set user and owner passwords, allow printing, and save the protected document.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑256 and Custom Privileges
examples.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF using AES‑256 while applying a custom set of document privileges (allow printing, forbid copying and modifications) in a single operation.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑256 and Write to Cloud Stream
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf to encrypt a PDF with AES‑256 and directly save the encrypted file to a cloud storage stream.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF Byte Array with Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF from a byte array, encrypting it with user and owner passwords using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSecurity, and returning the encrypted PDF as a byte array.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with RC4‑128 and Allow Print/Edit Permissions
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF, combine privilege settings to allow printing and content modification, and then encrypt the document using RC4‑128 with Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with RC4‑40 using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF file with the RC4‑40 algorithm and a user password using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSecurity facade.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF Stream with RC4‑40 using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF from a stream, apply RC4‑40 encryption with user/owner passwords, and return the encrypted PDF as a new stream using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF and Save to MemoryStream
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, applying AES‑128 encryption with user/owner passwords and specific permissions, and writing the encrypted document to a MemoryStream for network transmission.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with Detailed Exception Handling
examples.description: Demonstrates how to enable AllowExceptions on PdfFileSecurity, attempt PDF encryption with TryEncryptFile, and retrieve detailed error information via LastException.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with User Password Only
examples.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades by providing only a user password (owner password left undefined) and applying 256‑bit encryption with selected privileges.

examples.title: Encrypt PDFs Using Naming Convention to Select Algorithm
examples.description: The example scans a folder of PDF files, determines the encryption algorithm and key size from each file's name, and encrypts the documents with the chosen settings using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Encrypt PDFs with Performance Timing
examples.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt multiple PDF files using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSecurity facade while measuring and logging the time taken for each encryption operation.

examples.title: Generate Encryption Usage Report for PDFs
examples.description: Iterates over a collection of PDF files, uses Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo to determine if each document is encrypted, and writes a text report showing the encryption status and algorithm information availability.

examples.title: Generate PDF Encryption Summary CSV
examples.description: Scans a folder of PDF files, detects each file’s encryption status, algorithm (if known), and document privileges, and writes the results to a CSV summary file.

examples.title: Load PDF and Verify Page Count using PdfFileInfo
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF file with the PdfFileInfo facade, retrieving the underlying Document object, and confirming successful loading by checking that the document contains at least one page.

examples.title: Modify PDF Privileges Using PdfFileSecurity
examples.description: Demonstrates how to change PDF security privileges (e.g., allow printing) with Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSecurity facade. The example creates a PDF, binds it, sets a privilege, and saves the result.

examples.title: Remove Usage Rights from Signed PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to bind a signed PDF, check for embedded usage rights, remove them, and save the resulting document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Remove Usage Rights and Verify Removal from PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, remove its usage rights using the PdfFileSignature facade, verify the removal with ContainsUsageRights, and save the updated document.

examples.title: Retrieve PDF Encryption Algorithm
examples.description: Loads a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, reads the CryptoAlgorithm property, and displays the encryption algorithm or indicates the document is not encrypted.

examples.title: Allow Form Filling and Disable Assembly in PDF
examples.description: The example demonstrates how to apply document privileges to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, enabling form filling while disabling document assembly.

examples.title: Set PDF Privileges to Allow Printing Only
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSecurity to enable printing while disabling copying, then save the secured PDF.

examples.title: Update Owner Password of Encrypted PDF
examples.description: Shows how to change the owner password of a protected PDF while keeping the existing user password and permissions unchanged using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Validate PDF Encryption Before Decryption
examples.description: Demonstrates how to check if a PDF is encrypted using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and, if so, decrypt it with a password while avoiding unnecessary exceptions.

examples.title: Verify Decryption Fails with Incorrect Owner Password
examples.description: Creates a PDF, encrypts it with a known owner password, then attempts decryption using a wrong owner password and checks that the operation fails.

examples.title: Add Locale‑Specific Visible Signatures to PDF
examples.description: Signs a PDF on multiple pages with visible signatures, each using a different culture (German, Spanish, Japanese) by configuring SignatureCustomAppearance.Culture.

examples.title: Add Multiple Digital Signatures to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to apply two digital signatures on different pages and rectangle areas of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Apply Semi-Transparent Signature Appearance to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to sign a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades with a semi‑transparent PNG image as the visual signature appearance, improving document readability.

examples.title: Audit PDF Signatures: List Reason and Location
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to read digital signatures from a PDF and retrieve each signature's reason and location for auditing purposes.

examples.title: Create and Sign a PDF Signature Field on a Specific Page
examples.description: Shows how to add a digital signature field to a chosen page of a PDF and then sign it using a certificate with Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Create an Invisible Digital Signature for a PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates signing a PDF with a cryptographically valid digital signature while completely hiding the visual appearance using Aspose.Pdf facades.

examples.title: Create Custom Signature Appearance Without 'Digitally signed by' Caption
examples.description: Demonstrates how to sign a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and hide the default "Digitally signed by" label by disabling signature properties or providing a custom appearance.

examples.title: Digitally Sign First Page of PDF
examples.description: Shows how to bind a PDF using PdfFileSignature, configure a certificate, add a visible digital signature to page 1, and save the signed document.

examples.title: Extract Certificate Details from PDF Signature Field
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a signed PDF, enumerate its signature fields, and extract the X.509 certificate to read issuer and expiration information.

examples.title: Extract and Log Certificate Serial Number from PDF Signature
examples.description: The example opens a signed PDF, verifies the presence of digital signatures, extracts each signature's X.509 certificate, and logs the certificate's serial number for audit purposes.

examples.title: Extract Signature Image and Save as PNG

examples.title: Read PDF Page Count with Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and retrieve the total number of pages without saving the document.

examples.title: Read PDF Page Dimensions
examples.description: Loads a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf, iterates through each page, and logs the width and height of every page to the console.

examples.title: Remove Specific Bates Numbering Stamp from PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to locate and delete Bates numbering artifacts with a given prefix on selected pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Reorder PDF Pages by Orientation (Landscape then Portrait)
examples.description: Loads a PDF, separates its pages into landscape and portrait groups, then creates a new PDF with all landscape pages followed by all portrait pages.

examples.title: Reorder PDF Pages Using Custom Sequence
examples.description: Shows how to reorder the pages of a PDF by providing a custom integer array and saving the reordered document.

examples.title: Reorder PDF Pages in Descending Order
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, reorder its pages in descending numeric order, and save the reordered document.

examples.title: Replace Bates Numbering in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to delete any existing Bates numbering artifacts from all pages of a PDF and then add a new Bates numbering sequence using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Replace PDF Headers and Footers
examples.description: Shows how to remove any existing header and footer from each page of a PDF and then add a new header and footer using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Reset PDF Page Rotation to Original Orientation
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, read a page's current rotation, reset it to the default (no rotation), and save the updated document.

examples.title: Resize All PDF Pages to A5
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, loop through its pages, resize each page to A5 dimensions, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Resize First PDF Page to Custom Dimensions
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, change the size of the first page to 500 × 700 points, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Resize PDF Pages to Fixed Width
examples.description: Shows how to batch resize all pages in a PDF to a fixed width of 800 points while preserving the original aspect ratio using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Resize PDF Pages to Match Template Size
examples.description: Shows how to load a template PDF, read its first page dimensions, and apply those dimensions to all pages of another PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Resize PDF Pages to Printable Area
examples.description: Demonstrates how to scale each page of a PDF so that its content fits within a printable area of 595 × 842 points using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Resize PDF Pages to Match a Template Size
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a reference PDF, extract its page dimensions, and resize every page of another PDF to those dimensions using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Resize PDF Pages to Uniform Size
examples.description: Shows how to determine the largest page dimensions in a PDF and resize all pages to that size using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Resize Seventh PDF Page to Letter Size
examples.description: Shows how to open a PDF, ensure it has at least seven pages, and change the size of the seventh page to Letter format using Aspose.Pdf's SetPageSize method.

examples.title: Resize Wide PDF Pages to A4
examples.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through its pages, and resizes any page wider than 600 points to standard A4 dimensions while leaving narrower pages unchanged.

examples.title: Retrieve TrimBox Values from PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, optionally setting a CropBox, and reading the TrimBox coordinates of each page to verify the content area.

examples.title: Rotate All PDF Pages 180 Degrees
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, rotate each page by 180°, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Rotate Even Pages of a PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, and set a 90‑degree rotation on even‑numbered pages while leaving odd pages unchanged, then save the result.

examples.title: Rotate Every Third PDF Page by 90 Degrees
examples.description: Shows how to open a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, rotate pages whose number is divisible by three by 90 degrees, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Rotate Fourth Page of PDF by 90 Degrees
examples.description: Loads a PDF, verifies it has at least four pages, rotates the fourth page 90° clockwise using the Rotate property, and saves the modified document.

examples.title: Rotate PDF Pages by Configurable Angles
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, applying page‑specific rotations defined in a dictionary, and saving the modified document.

examples.title: Rotate PDF Pages in Reverse Order
examples.description: Demonstrates how to rotate each page of a PDF 90 degrees clockwise, processing pages from the last to the first using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Set Alternating Page Background Colors in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, and assign LightGray or White background colors alternately before saving the document.

examples.title: Set PDF Page Background Color Using CMYK Values
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, create a CMYK color, apply it as the background for each page, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Set PDF Page Background Color with RGB
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, define an RGB brand color, apply it as the background for each page (and optionally the whole document), and save the modified file.

examples.title: Set PDF Page Background Color from Theme Configuration
examples.description: Shows how to read a theme value from a JSON file and apply the corresponding background color to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Set PDF Page Background Color Using HSL Values
examples.description: Demonstrates converting HSL color values to an Aspose.Pdf.Color and applying it as the background of a PDF page.

examples.title: Set PDF Page Background to Transparent
examples.description: Demonstrates how to make each page of a PDF have a fully transparent background using Aspose.Pdf, useful for overlay documents.

examples.title: Trim White Space Around PDF Pages Using Content Bounding Box
examples.description: Demonstrates how to automatically trim the white margins of each page in a PDF by calculating the content bounding box and setting the page's TrimBox accordingly.

examples.title: Trim White Space and Remove Blank Pages with Pixel Tolerance
examples.description: Demonstrates how to detect and delete blank PDF pages using a custom pixel‑based tolerance, and optionally adjust the TrimBox to remove surrounding white space.

examples.title: Batch Extract Vector Graphics from PDFs to SVG
examples.description: Shows how to iterate through PDF files in a folder, detect pages containing vector graphics, and save each page's graphics as separate SVG files using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Combine Form Data from Multiple PDFs into a JSON Array
examples.description: Demonstrates loading several PDF files, exporting each form's fields to JSON, and merging them into a single JSON array for batch processing.

examples.title: Combine PDF Vector Graphics into a Single SVG
examples.description: Loads a PDF, extracts vector graphics from each page using Aspose.Pdf, and merges the graphics into a multi‑page SVG document.

examples.title: Combine Vector Graphics from Multiple PDFs into a Single SVG
examples.description: Shows how to extract vector graphics from each page of several PDF documents using Aspose.Pdf's SvgExtractor and merge the fragments into one combined multi‑page SVG file.

examples.title: Count AcroForm Fields in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and retrieve the total number of AcroForm fields using the Document.Form.Count property.

examples.title: Enumerate PDF Form Fields on a Page
examples.description: Demonstrates opening a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, selecting a specific page, retrieving its form fields in tab order, and logging each field's name, type, and value.

examples.title: Export PDF AcroForm Fields to XFDF
examples.description: Loads a PDF document, creates a FileStream, and exports the AcroForm fields (as annotations) to an XFDF file using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Export Filtered PDF Form Fields to JSON
examples.description: Loads a PDF, selects form fields whose names start with a given prefix, and writes their values to a JSON array file.

examples.title: Export PDF AcroForm Fields to JSON
examples.description: Loads a PDF document, extracts all AcroForm field names and values, and writes them to a JSON file using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF File
examples.description: Loads a PDF document and uses Aspose.Pdf's Document.ExportAnnotationsToXfdf method to write annotations and form fields to an XFDF file via a FileStream, which is then closed automatically.

examples.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, exporting its annotations and form field data to an XFDF file via a FileStream, and handling resources with using blocks.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Data to JSON Bytes
examples.description: Loads a PDF document, extracts all form fields, serializes them to JSON, and returns the JSON as a byte array via a MemoryStream for API consumption.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Data to JSON
examples.description: Loads a PDF document, extracts all form fields, and writes them as a UTF‑8 encoded JSON file on disk.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Data to JSON Files
examples.description: Iterates through PDF files in a folder, loads each with Aspose.Pdf, and exports its form fields to a separate JSON file.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Data to JSON
examples.description: Shows how to build a simple command‑line tool that loads a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and exports its interactive form fields to a JSON file.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Data to JSON Stream
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, accessing its form, and exporting all form field values directly to a JSON file using a FileStream.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Data to XFDF using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: The example loads a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf and exports its form field data (as annotations) to an XFDF file by writing directly to a FileStream.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Data to XML (XFDF) Using MemoryStream
examples.description: Demonstrates how to export form field data from a PDF document to an XML (XFDF) representation directly into a MemoryStream using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Fields to JSON
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF document, export all its form fields to a JSON string using Aspose.Pdf's ExportToJson method, and output the JSON.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Fields to XML
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate its form fields, extract each field's value, and write the data to an XML file.

examples.title: Export PDF Page as PNG Image
examples.description: Shows how to rasterize a PDF page, including all vector elements, into a PNG file at a specified DPI using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Export PDF Pages Vector Graphics to SVG Preserving Coordinate System
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, and save each page's vector graphics as an SVG file while keeping the original PDF coordinate system.

examples.title: Export PDF Subpaths as Separate SVG Images
examples.description: Shows how to extract each subpath of graphic elements from a PDF page and save them as individual SVG files with transparent backgrounds using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Export PDF Tables to CSV with Visual Border Markers
examples.description: Loads a PDF, extracts tables using TableAbsorber, and writes them to a CSV file where each cell is wrapped with '|' delimiters and a horizontal separator line is added to preserve visual table borders.

examples.title: Export PDF to PDF, HTML, and XML with Proper Stream Disposal
examples.description: Demonstrates how to export a PDF document to a copy PDF, HTML, and XML using Aspose.Pdf while correctly closing each FileStream to free system resources.

examples.title: Export PDF to SVG with Custom Rendering Options
examples.description: Shows how to convert a PDF document to SVG using Aspose.Pdf with custom DPI scaling, multithreading, and caching, and how to extract individual vector graphics from a page with extraction settings.

examples.title: Extract Checkbox States from PDF AcroForm to JSON
examples.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through its AcroForm fields, collects the checked state of each checkbox, and writes the boolean list to a JSON file.

examples.title: Extract and Filter PDF Graphics by Area to SVG
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to collect graphic elements from each PDF page, filter them by bounding‑box area, and export the qualifying graphics as an SVG file.

examples.title: Extract First Page Text from PDF to UTF-8 File
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract the text from its first page using a TextAbsorber, and save the result to a UTF‑8 encoded text file.

examples.title: Extract Fonts from PDF and Save as TTF Files
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, retrieve all embedded fonts, and export each font to a .ttf file in a designated folder.

examples.title: Extract Graphics from Specific PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's GraphicsAbsorber to collect graphic elements from selected pages and export each element as an individual SVG file.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Save as PNG
examples.description: Loads a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterates through each page's image resources, and saves each image as a PNG file in a specified output folder.

examples.title: Extract Paragraphs from PDF Preserving Line Breaks
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf to absorb paragraph structures from each page of a PDF and save the extracted text, with original line breaks, to a .txt file.

examples.title: Extract PDF Form Field Names and Values
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and read all form field names and their current values into a dictionary.

examples.title: Extract Text from PDF Form XObjects with Timestamp Logging
examples.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through each page's form XObjects, extracts their text using Aspose.Pdf's TextAbsorber, and logs start/end timestamps and duration of the extraction run.

examples.title: Extract PDF Metadata and Export Vector Data (APS)
examples.description: The example loads a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, reads standard metadata such as Author and Title, and then saves the document's vector graphics to an APS file for documentation purposes.

examples.title: Extract PDF Paragraphs to Markdown Preserving Indentation
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, using ParagraphAbsorber to extract paragraphs while keeping leading spaces, and writing the extracted text to a markdown file.

examples.title: Extract PDF Tables to Separate CSV Files
examples.description: Demonstrates how to locate tables in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, extract their contents, and write each table to an individual CSV file with proper escaping.

examples.title: Extract Selected Radio Button Labels from PDF Form
examples.description: Loads a PDF, iterates over its form fields, and retrieves the display label of the selected option for each radio button field.

examples.title: Extract Single Graphic Element as SVG
examples.description: Loads a PDF, extracts vector graphics from a specified page using Aspose.Pdf.Vector.SvgExtractor, selects an element by its index, and saves the SVG content to a file.

examples.title: Extract Stamp Annotation Text from PDF
examples.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through all pages and their annotations, collects the visible text of stamp annotations, and writes the results to a JSON array.

examples.title: Extract Subpaths as PNG Images Using GraphicsAbsorber
examples.description: Shows how to capture each graphic SubPath on PDF pages with GraphicsAbsorber, place it on a temporary page, and render it to an individual PNG file.

examples.title: Extract Superscript and Subscript Text from PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, detect superscript and subscript formatting using TextFragmentAbsorber, and output the extracted text with simple Unicode markers.

examples.title: Extract Superscripts and Subscripts from PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract text from a PDF, detect superscript and subscript characters using font size and baseline heuristics, and annotate them in a plain‑text output file.

examples.title: Extract SVG Vector Graphics and Apply Brand Color Transformation
examples.description: The example extracts vector graphics from each PDF page as SVG, replaces black fill/stroke colors with a brand red using a regex, and saves the transformed SVG files.

examples.title: Extract Text from PDF and Save to TXT
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, use TextAbsorber to extract text from all pages, and write the concatenated result to a .txt file.

examples.title: Extract Vector Graphics from Encrypted PDF
examples.description: Shows how to open an encrypted PDF by supplying a password, optionally decrypt it, and export each page's vector graphics as separate SVG files using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Extract Vector Graphics from PDF Page to SVG
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, select a specific page, and extract each vector graphic on that page as separate SVG files using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Extract Vector Graphics from PDF to Individual SVG Files
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, detect pages that contain vector graphics, and export each graphic as a separate SVG file into page‑specific folders.

examples.title: Iterate Over PDF Form Fields and Set Values
examples.description: Loads a PDF, loops through each form field using the Document.Form collection, sets sample values based on field type, logs the field information, and saves the updated document.

examples.title: Iterate PDF Pages to List Form Fields
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, loop through each page, retrieve the form fields on that page, and print their hierarchical names.

examples.title: Load PDF and Extract AcroForm Fields
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, access its AcroForm, and iterate through all form fields to display their names and values.

examples.title: Log Form Field Count per PDF Page
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, count the form fields (WidgetAnnotations) on each page, and log the counts for monitoring purposes.

examples.title: Modify Checkbox Appearance and Extract Value using Aspose.PDF Drawing
examples.description: The example loads a PDF, finds the first checkbox form field, changes its style, color, and border, draws a red rectangle around it using the Drawing API, saves the document, and then reads the checkbox value.

examples.title: Parallel PDF Text Extraction with Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates extracting text from multiple PDF files concurrently using the Task Parallel Library and Aspose.Pdf's Document and TextAbsorber classes.

examples.title: Parse Numeric Form Fields and Calculate Sum
examples.description: Shows how to iterate through PDF form fields, extract numeric values from NumberField objects, parse them as decimals, and compute a total.

examples.title: PDF Summary Report with Text Length, Image and Graphics Count
examples.description: Loads a PDF, extracts the total character count using TextAbsorber, counts images and vector graphics (via Form XObjects) on each page, and prints a concise summary report.

examples.title: Read AcroForm Fields from PDF Stream
examples.description: Shows how to open a PDF file as a stream, create an Aspose.Pdf Document, and enumerate its AcroForm fields without saving the file to disk.

examples.title: Read Checkbox Value and Convert to Boolean
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, access a checkbox form field, read its Value property, and convert the string value to a Boolean indicating whether the box is checked.

examples.title: Retrieve All AcroForm Fields from a PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, access its AcroForm collection, and enumerate all form fields, printing each field's name and current value.

examples.title: Retrieve PDF Form Field Types
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, access its form, iterate over each form field, and obtain the runtime type of each field using GetType() for classification.

examples.title: Retrieve PDF Form Field by Name
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, accessing a specific form field using the Document.Form indexer, and reading its current value.

examples.title: Validate PDF Fonts Against System Installation
examples.description: The example opens a PDF, enumerates all fonts used on each page, checks if they are installed on the host system, and reports any missing font dependencies.

examples.title: Add Digital Signature to PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, create a signature field, apply a PKCS#1 digital signature from a PFX certificate, and save the signed document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Empty Signature Field to PDF and List Existing Signatures
examples.description: The example loads a PDF, enumerates any existing signature fields, creates a new empty signature field on a specified rectangle, adds it to the form, and saves the updated document.

examples.title: Add Visible Digital Signature to PDF Second Page
examples.description: Loads a PDF, creates a visible signature field at the bottom‑right corner of the second page, and signs it with a PFX certificate.

examples.title: Add Warning Overlay and Disable Copy‑Paste in PDF
examples.description: The example loads a PDF, adds a semi‑transparent "CONFIDENTIAL – DO NOT COPY" text stamp to every page, then encrypts the document with AES‑256 while allowing only printing and modification, effectively disabling copy‑paste.

examples.title: Apply Invisible Digital Signature to PDF with Timestamp
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add an invisible PKCS#7 digital signature to a PDF, recording the signing time without altering the document layout.

examples.title: Apply PKCS#7 Detached Signature to a PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF from a file stream, creating a signature field, configuring a PKCS#7 detached signature, and saving the signed document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Batch Decrypt Password-Protected PDFs Using a Lookup Table
examples.description: Demonstrates how to decrypt multiple password‑protected PDF files in a folder by reading file‑specific passwords from a simple lookup text file and saving the decrypted versions.

examples.title: Batch Encrypt and Sign PDFs
examples.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt multiple PDF files with AES‑256 and then apply a PKCS#7 digital signature to each encrypted document using Aspose.PDF for .NET.

examples.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs and Archive to ZIP
examples.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt multiple PDF files with unique passwords using Aspose.Pdf and then package the encrypted PDFs into a ZIP archive.

examples.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs Using File Name Passwords
examples.description: Shows how to encrypt every PDF in a folder with Aspose.Pdf, using the file name as both user and owner passwords and saving the protected files to an output directory.

examples.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs with Deterministic Passwords
examples.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt all PDF files in a folder using Aspose.Pdf, generating a password from the file name combined with the current date and applying specific permissions.

examples.title: Batch Sign and Compress PDFs
examples.description: Shows how to iterate through a folder of PDF files, add a PKCS#7 digital signature field, optimize resources to compress the document, and save the signed PDFs using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Batch Sign PDFs Using Metadata-Driven Certificate Selection
examples.description: The example loads each PDF, reads its Title metadata, selects a matching certificate, adds a signature field, signs the document, and saves it to an output folder.

examples.title: Batch Sign PDFs with Certificate and Timestamp
examples.description: Demonstrates how to sign all PDF files in a folder using a PFX certificate and a timestamp authority, saving the signed documents to an output directory.

examples.title: Batch Sign PDFs with Document-Type Certificates
examples.description: Demonstrates signing a batch of PDF files using Aspose.Pdf, selecting a PKCS#7 certificate based on document type and applying it to all signature fields in each PDF.

examples.title: Create a Certified PDF Signature Allowing Annotations
examples.description: Shows how to add a signature field to a PDF and sign it with a PKCS#1 certificate using Aspose.Pdf, highlighting that true certification signatures require the Facades API.

examples.title: Custom Security Handler with Logging for Encrypted PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to implement a custom ICustomSecurityHandler that logs password checks and encryption actions, then encrypts and opens a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Apply Custom Security Handler to Restrict Copy‑Paste in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to implement a simple custom security handler and use it with Aspose.Pdf to encrypt a PDF while disabling content extraction (copy‑paste).

examples.title: Decrypt PDF, Extract Images, and Re‑encrypt with New Owner Password
examples.description: The example opens an encrypted PDF using the existing owner password, removes the encryption, extracts all embedded images to separate files, and then re‑encrypts the PDF with a new owner password and specific permissions.

examples.title: Decrypt PDF and Re‑sign All Signature Fields with Multiple Certificates
examples.description: The example opens an encrypted PDF, extracts every signature field, and re‑signs each field using a different PFX certificate before saving the updated document.

examples.title: Decrypt PDF with Owner Password and Update Metadata
examples.description: Shows how to open an encrypted PDF using the owner password, remove its encryption, modify document metadata, and save the updated file.

examples.title: Decrypt PDF Using Certificate from Hardware Token
examples.description: Shows how to open a PDF encrypted with a certificate, retrieve the private key from a hardware token via store settings, decrypt the document, and save the unencrypted version using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Decrypt PDF with Owner Password using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Shows how to open an encrypted PDF with the owner password, remove its encryption, and save the decrypted document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑256 and Passwords
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, applying AES‑256 encryption with user and owner passwords, setting basic permissions, and saving the protected document.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF and Allow Copy While Blocking Printing
examples.description: The example loads a PDF, encrypts it with AES‑256, sets permissions to allow content extraction (copy) but disables printing, and saves the protected document.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with Certificate and Digitally Sign It
examples.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF using a certificate's public key and then apply a PKCS#7 digital signature with the same certificate using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF and Disable Content Extraction
examples.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF with AES‑256 using Aspose.Pdf, set an empty permissions set to disable all content extraction, and save the protected file.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with User Password and Disable Printing
examples.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF with a user password, set an owner password, restrict permissions to disable printing, and save the protected document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with Owner Password for Editing Only
examples.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using Aspose.Pdf so it can be viewed without a password while requiring an owner password to restrict editing and define permissions.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with Owner Password and Allow High-Resolution Printing
examples.description: The example loads a PDF, encrypts it using an owner password, permits high‑resolution printing while disabling copying, and saves the protected document.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with Print-Only Permission
examples.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, set user and owner passwords, and restrict permissions so that only printing is allowed.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with RC4 128‑bit and Restrict Editing
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, apply RC4 128‑bit encryption with user and owner passwords, set permissions to allow only printing, and save the encrypted document.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with User and Owner Passwords and Remove User Password
examples.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF using both user and owner passwords with AES‑256, then remove the user password while keeping the document encrypted by using the owner password.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with Password and Permissions
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, set user and owner passwords, define allowed permissions, encrypt it with AES‑256, and save the protected document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with Printing and Copying Permissions
examples.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, set user and owner passwords, and enable printing and content extraction permissions.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with Smart Card Certificate using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Shows how to obtain a certificate from a smart card or HSM and encrypt a PDF with AES‑256, requiring the certificate for opening the document.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with User Password using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Loads a PDF from a byte array, encrypts it with a user password (owner password set to the same value) and returns the encrypted PDF as a byte array.

examples.title: Create Encrypted PDF with Embedded Attachment and Digital Signature
examples.description: The example creates a PDF, embeds a file as an attachment, adds a signature field, applies a PKCS#7 detached digital signature, and encrypts the document with user and owner passwords.

examples.title: Extract Certificate Chain from PDF Signatures
examples.description: Shows how to load a signed PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract each signature's signing certificate, build its X509 chain, and save every certificate in the chain as a DER file.

examples.title: Extract Digest Algorithm from PDF Signatures
examples.description: Loads a PDF, iterates over its signature fields and logs the digest hash algorithm used by each digital signature for compliance reporting.

examples.title: Extract Images from Signed PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to load a signed PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through each page, extract embedded images, and save them as PNG files.

examples.title: Extract Images from Each Page of a Signed PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a signed PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, and save each embedded image into page‑specific folders.

examples.title: Extract Signature Certificate Chain and Verify Expiration
examples.description: Loads a signed PDF, extracts the X.509 certificate from each signature field, builds its certificate chain, and reports whether any chain element is expired.

examples.title: Extract Signature Field Metadata from PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its form fields, identify signature fields, and read both field properties and embedded signature details.

examples.title: Extract Signature Field Names and Page Numbers from PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, access its form collection, filter for signature fields, and output each field's name and page number.

examples.title: Extract Signature Image from PDF and Save as PNG
examples.description: Shows how to locate a signature field in a PDF, extract its appearance image, and write it out as a PNG file using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Extract Signature Field Images from a PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to locate signature fields in a PDF and extract their appearance images as JPEG files using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Extract Signature Signing Time and Convert to UTC
examples.description: Shows how to open a signed PDF, retrieve a signature field, read its signing date, and convert that timestamp to UTC in ISO‑8601 format.

examples.title: Lock Specific Form Fields After Signing a PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a signature field, apply a PKCS#7 signature, and set selected form fields to read‑only to prevent edits after signing using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Create a PDF Certification Signature that Disallows Modifications
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a certification (DocMDP) signature to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, configuring the document to be append‑only so that no further changes are allowed after signing.

examples.title: Remove Digital Signature from PDF
examples.description: Shows how to strip a digital signature from a PDF (when allowed) by enabling signature sanitization and saving the document with Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Retrieve Reason and Location from PDF Digital Signatures
examples.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through its form fields, identifies signature fields and extracts the Reason and Location metadata stored in each signature's PKCS#7 object.

examples.title: Set PDF Privileges to Disable Extraction and Form Filling
examples.description: Loads a signed PDF, applies AES‑256 encryption with an owner password and permissions that allow only printing, thereby disabling content extraction and form filling, and saves the updated file.

examples.title: Sign PDF with PKCS#1 and Embed Custom XMP Metadata
examples.description: The example loads a PDF, adds a visible signature field, signs the document using a PKCS#1 certificate, and embeds a custom XMP metadata property describing the signing process.

examples.title: Sign PDF and Flatten Signature Appearance
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a digital signature to a PDF using a PKCS#7 certificate, then flatten the document to make the signature appearance permanent and prevent further visual changes.

examples.title: Sign PDF with Append‑Only for Future Signatures
examples.description: Shows how to create a signature field, apply a PKCS#7 digital signature, enable append‑only mode, and save the PDF so additional signatures can be added later.

examples.title: Sign PDF and Embed Custom XFA Data
examples.description: Loads a PDF, assigns custom XFA XML to the form, creates a signature field, signs the document with a PKCS#7 certificate, and saves the signed PDF.

examples.title: Sign PDF and Enforce Finality
examples.description: Shows how to add a digital signature to a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and then lock the document to prevent any further signatures.

examples.title: Sign PDF and Flatten Form Fields
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a digital signature to a PDF using a PKCS#7 certificate, then flatten all form fields to prevent further editing.

examples.title: Sign PDF and Lock Signature Field
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a digital signature field to a PDF, apply a PKCS#7 signature using a certificate, and lock the field to prevent further modifications.

examples.title: Sign PDF and Remove All Annotations While Preserving Signature
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a digital signature to a PDF, disable signature sanitization, and then delete every annotation except the signature field before saving the document.

examples.title: Sign PDF with Custom Image Appearance
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a visible digital signature to a PDF using a custom graphic image as the signature appearance with Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Sign PDF with ECC P‑256 Private Key using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates how to sign a PDF document with an ECC P‑256 private key stored in a PFX file using Aspose.Pdf, creating a signature field and applying a PKCS#7 signature.

examples.title: Sign PDF with Hardware Token Certificate
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, add a signature field, retrieve a signing certificate from a hardware token, and sign the document using Aspose.Pdf's ExternalSignature.

examples.title: Sign PDF with Reason, Contact Info, and Location
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a digital signature field to a PDF and sign it using a PKCS#7 certificate while populating the Reason, ContactInfo, and Location metadata fields with Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Sign PDF with PKCS#7 Signature Field
examples.description: Shows how to add a signature field to a PDF, configure a PKCS#7 signature using a PFX certificate, and sign the document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Sign PDF with RSA 4096‑bit Certificate
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, add a signature field, and digitally sign it using a PKCS#1 RSA 4096‑bit certificate stored in a PFX file.

examples.title: Sign PDF with SHA‑512 Digest using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a certificate, adding a signature field to a PDF, and signing it with the SHA‑512 digest algorithm using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Sign PDF with Smart Card without PIN Prompt
examples.description: Shows how to create a signature field in a PDF and sign it using a certificate from a smart card via Aspose.Pdf, performing the signing operation silently without a PIN dialog.

examples.title: Sign PDF with Smart Card Certificate
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, creating a signature field, and signing the document using a smart‑card certificate accessed from the current user store.

examples.title: Sign PDF with Timestamp from TSA
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a visible digital signature to a PDF and apply a trusted timestamp from a Time‑Stamp Authority using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Sign PDF with Visible Signature Using PFX Certificate
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, add a visible signature field, and digitally sign the document using a PFX certificate with Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Sign PDF with Certificate from Windows Store
examples.description: Shows how to retrieve a certificate by thumbprint from the CurrentUser store and apply it to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's signature field and external signature classes.

examples.title: Validate PDF Digital Signature Using OCSP
examples.description: Loads a signed PDF, locates the first signature field, and verifies the signature using OCSP revocation checking with Aspose.Pdf validation options.

examples.title: Validate PDF Digital Signature Against Trusted CA
examples.description: Loads a PDF, locates signature fields, verifies each signature using strict validation options, and writes a PDF/A‑1B structural validation log.

examples.title: Validate PDF Signature Using CRL Revocation Checking
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a signed PDF, configure validation options to use CRL distribution points, and verify each signature field's revocation status.

examples.title: Validate PDF Signature and Extract Certificate SAN
examples.description: Demonstrates how to verify a PDF digital signature using SignedCms and retrieve the signing certificate's Subject Alternative Name entries with Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Validate PKCS#7 Detached Signature and Certificate Chain in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, find a signature field, and verify a PKCS#7 detached digital signature while performing certificate‑chain validation using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Bold Outlined Text Stamp to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to place a text stamp with fill‑stroke rendering on each page of a PDF, creating bold outlined text using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Confidential Text Stamp to PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a semi‑transparent 'CONFIDENTIAL' text stamp to each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Custom-Sized Page Stamp to Specific PDF Page
examples.description: Shows how to create a page stamp from an existing PDF page, set custom width, height and position, and apply it to a chosen page in the document.

examples.title: Add Custom Text Stamp to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to place a text stamp with a custom font, size, and blue color on the first page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Diagonal Image Watermark to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to apply an image stamp rotated 90 degrees as a diagonal watermark on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Diagonal Text Stamp Watermark to PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a semi‑transparent diagonal "CONFIDENTIAL" text stamp to each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Faint Text Overlay Stamp to PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to apply a semi‑transparent text stamp as a faint overlay on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Fixed-Size Image Stamp to PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to place an image stamp with a fixed width and height on every page of a PDF, independent of page dimensions, using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Full-Page Image Watermark to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to overlay an image stamp as a semi‑transparent background watermark that covers the entire size of each page in a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Fully Opaque Image Watermark to PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, create an ImageStamp with full opacity, center it, and apply it to every page as a visual watermark.

examples.title: Add Image Background to FloatingBox on Page 4
examples.description: Loads a PDF, creates an Image from a PNG file, sets it as the background of a FloatingBox, and inserts that FloatingBox onto the fourth page of the document.

examples.description: Shows how to place an image stamp with alternative (accessibility) text on each page of a PDF and then convert the document to PDF/A‑1b compliance using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Image Stamp as Background to PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, create an ImageStamp, set its Background property to true, and apply it to each page as a background watermark.

examples.title: Add Image Stamp and Flatten Annotations to Create Read‑Only PDF
examples.description: Shows how to place an image stamp on a PDF page and then flatten all annotations, resulting in a read‑only PDF document.

examples.title: Add Image Stamp from Memory Stream to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load an image into a MemoryStream and use Aspose.Pdf to stamp that image onto every page of a PDF document.

examples.title: Add Image Stamp to PDF While Preserving AcroForm Fields
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, iterating its pages, applying an image stamp with alignment and opacity, and saving the document while keeping existing AcroForm fields intact.

examples.description: Demonstrates how to add an image stamp to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf while keeping existing bookmarks and the document outline intact.

examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, add a semi‑transparent image stamp to each page, and save the document while keeping any embedded files intact.

examples.description: Demonstrates adding an image stamp to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf while keeping any existing JavaScript actions intact.

examples.description: Demonstrates adding an image stamp to each page of a PDF that contains interactive form fields while keeping the fields functional.

examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, creating an ImageStamp, rotating it 90 degrees, setting alignment and opacity, applying it to every page, and saving the result.

examples.description: Shows how to place a right‑to‑left Arabic text stamp on every page of a PDF and set the document language for proper RTL rendering using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Semi-Transparent Logo Stamp to First PDF Page

examples.title: Add Slanted Text Watermark to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a text stamp, rotate it 30 degrees, and apply it as a semi‑transparent watermark on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Text Stamp with Auto‑Adjusting Font Size
examples.description: Demonstrates how to place a text stamp on a PDF page and enable automatic font size adjustment so the text fits within a defined rectangle using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.description: Shows how to create a TextStamp and apply it to every page of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.description: Shows how to place an image stamp rotated 180 degrees on a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, create an image stamp, rotate it by 45 degrees, position it, and add it to a page using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.description: Demonstrates how to embed a Flash (SWF) video in a PDF using a RichMediaAnnotation, configure a custom player, poster image, and activation settings.

examples.description: Demonstrates how to insert a SoundAnnotation that plays an MP3 file when the annotation area is clicked, using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.description: Demonstrates how to attach a different video file to each page of a multi‑page PDF by creating ScreenAnnotation objects and saving the updated document.

examples.title: Thread‑Safe XML to PDF Conversion Using Parallel Processing
examples.description: Demonstrates converting multiple XML files to PDF concurrently with Aspose.Pdf, using XmlLoadOptions and Document inside a Parallel.ForEach loop to ensure thread safety.

examples.title: Validate PDF/A-2b Compliance After Converting XML to PDF
examples.description: Loads an XML file, converts it to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, then validates the PDF against PDF/A-2b standards and writes a validation log.

examples.title: Validate XML against XSD and Generate PDF
examples.description: The example validates an XML file using an XSD schema and, if valid, creates a PDF with Aspose.Pdf that contains the extracted message element.

examples.title: XML to PDF Conversion with XSLT Unit Tests
examples.description: Demonstrates converting XML documents to PDF using Aspose.Pdf with and without XSLT transformations, including passing XSLT parameters, wrapped in NUnit-style unit tests.

examples.title: Convert XML to PDF and Validate PDF/A‑1B with Detailed Logging
examples.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file as a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, validating the result against PDF/A‑1B, and recording step‑by‑step processing and error information to log files.
